Registry / Terms / device

device

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00344 · 12 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 10 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

Ed.YearPublicationClauseDefinitionConsistency
20102007OIML R 21:2007
#00344
2.2.1
in this Recommendation the term "device" is used for any means by which a specific function is performed irrespective of the physical realization e.g. by a mechanism or a key initiating an operation; the device may be a small part or a major portion of an instrument
pending
20102000OIML R 129:2000
#01701
2.2 T.2
a part of an instrument that is usually manufactured as a separate unit and is capable of being independently tested
pending
20101998OIML R 125:1998
#02623
T.9
a part of an instrument that performs a specific function. It is usually manufactured as a separate unit and is capable of being independently tested
pending
20101986OIML D 16:1986
#00119
1.1.1
any physical artifact, apparatus, or item used in making a measurement. A « device » may be an active or passive measuring instrument (as in VML 6.1) or a measurement standard (etalon)
pending
202X2022OIML R139-1:2022
#02979
3.2.1
distinctive part of a measuring instrument or measuring system performing a specific task
pending
202X2021OIML R060:2021
#02981
A.1.3
identifiable instrument or part of an instrument or of a family of instruments that performs a specific function or functions (OIML D 11, 3.3.)
pending

#02980
2.1.2
identifiable instrument or part of an instrument or of a family of instruments that performs a specific function or functions [OIML D11, 3.3 [5]]
pending

pending

identifiable instrument or part of an instrument or of a family of instruments that performs a specific function or functions
pending

in this Recommendation the term “device” is used for any means by which a specific function is performed irrespective of the physical realization e.g. by a mechanism or a key initiating an operation; the device may be a small part or a major portion of an instrument
